_meta.purpose: Real GA4 website traffic data for the portfolio dashboard's 'leads by channel' drill-down. Pulled directly via Supermetrics (ds_id GAWA) at the Dispatch layer, since spawned code-task sessions do not have Supermetrics MCP access (confirmed 2026-07-11 — a code task attempting this hit a hard 'not connected in this session' wall).
_meta.important_boundary: This is website traffic data ONLY (sessions, users, source/medium). It cannot be joined to actual Nectar move-ins or leads — the move-in record carries no gclid/UTM/campaign identifier (see attribution-gap-nectar-gclid memory). Present this as 'website traffic (GA4)' alongside, never blended into, business outcome numbers like leads_converted or revenue.
_meta.coverage_notes: GA4 has individual per-facility properties for all 9 NSS locations (matched below by address against facility-coordinates.json). AFAM has ONE brand-wide rollup property covering all 19 stores together — no per-AFAM-facility GA4 breakdown exists. The 'StoreLocal - Rollup - GA4' property's traffic volume (1,000+ sessions) is far too large to be RNO1 alone, so it is recorded here as a brand-level figure of UNCERTAIN scope, not asserted as RNO1-specific — do not label it as RNO1's own traffic without further verification. One GA4 property ('GA4 - 2600 Evergreen Ave') did not match any of the 29 facility addresses and was not queried — flagged as unmatched, not investigated further.

AFAM.scope: all 19 AFAM facilities combined — no per-facility GA4 breakdown exists for AFAM

STORELOCAL_ROLLUP.scope: UNCERTAIN — traffic volume (900+ sessions) is far too large to be RNO1 alone; likely a StoreLocal-network-wide rollup, not RNO1-specific. Do not present this as RNO1's own traffic without further verification.

unmatched_ga4_properties.note: Address does not match any of the 29 facility-coordinates.json addresses. Not queried. Possibly a former/decommissioned location or an address variant not otherwise recorded — flagged, not investigated.

not_pulled.RNO1_individual: No dedicated per-facility GA4 property found for RNO1 specifically — only the ambiguous-scope StoreLocal rollup above.
not_pulled.AFAM_individual_facilities: GA4 does not have per-store properties for any of the 19 AFAM facilities — only the single brand-wide rollup.
not_pulled.google_ads_wider_fields: Clicks/Impressions/CTR/Avg CPC not pulled in this pass — this file is GA4-only. A separate pull would be needed for those AW fields if wanted.
